title: Log in and reach the authenticated dashboard
description: This test verifies that a registered user can log in and land on the dashboard with access to authenticated content.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the authenticated dashboard is displayed
Verify parking discovery content is visible

title: Register a new account successfully
description: This test verifies that a new driver can create an account and receive confirmation that registration succeeded.

steps.description: Fill in the name field with a valid name
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Verify an account creation confirmation is visible
Verify the user can proceed as an authenticated user

title: Allow admin access to the admin dashboard
description: A logged-in admin can open the admin area and see the admin dashboard content.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for an admin account
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed
Verify admin management sections are visible

title: Start a booking for an available slot with a vehicle number
description: This test verifies that a logged-in driver can select an available slot, enter a vehicle number, and confirm a booking.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click an available parking slot from the dashboard
Fill in the vehicle number field with a valid vehicle number
Verify a booking confirmation is visible
Verify the booking appears as active

title: Book an available parking slot
description: A logged-in driver can reserve an available parking slot with a vehicle number and see the booking confirmed.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for a driver account
Fill in the vehicle number field with a valid vehicle number
Verify a booking confirmation is visible
Verify the booking appears as active

title: View current bookings, end an active booking, and open the receipt
description: This test verifies that a user can review bookings, end an active booking, and see the generated receipt afterward.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the control to end an active booking
Open the receipt for the completed booking
Verify the booking is shown as completed

title: Open the admin dashboard and analytics summary
description: This verifies that an admin can access the admin home area and see dashboard analytics content.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed
Verify analytics summary content is displayed

title: End an active booking and view the receipt
description: A logged-in user can exit an active booking and then review the generated receipt for that completed stay.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for a registered user account
Open the receipt for the completed booking
Verify a completed booking receipt is displayed
Verify receipt charges and booking details are visible

title: Block regular users from the admin area
description: A logged-in non-admin user cannot access the admin dashboard and sees restricted access instead.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for a registered user account
Verify admin content is not visible
Verify an access restriction message is visible

title: Book a slot from the booking page
description: A logged-in driver can open a specific slot booking page, enter a vehicle number, and complete the reservation.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for a driver account
Fill in the vehicle number field with a valid vehicle number
Verify a booking confirmation is visible
Verify the booking is created successfully

title: Prevent a non-admin user from opening admin pages
description: This verifies that a regular authenticated user cannot access admin-only pages and is not shown admin content.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify admin content is not displayed
Verify an access restriction message is displayed

title: Access the dashboard after signing in
description: An authenticated user can reach the dashboard and see parking slots and active booking information.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for a registered user account
Verify parking slots and active bookings are visible

title: Add a new parking slot as an admin
description: This verifies that an admin can create a parking slot and see it appear in the slot list.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the new slot appears in the slot list

title: View parking slots and active bookings on the dashboard
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can open the dashboard and see parking slots along with active booking information.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify active bookings information is visible

title: View personal bookings list
description: A logged-in user can open their bookings page and see their own booking history and active bookings.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for a registered user account
Verify the user's bookings are displayed
Verify active booking information is visible

title: Toggle a parking slot status as an admin
description: This verifies that an admin can change a slot's availability status and see the updated state in the list.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the slot status changes in the slot list

title: View parking availability on the map
description: This test verifies that a visitor can open the parking map and see slot availability information.

steps.description: Verify the parking map is displayed
Verify slot availability information is visible

title: Update profile details and notification preferences
description: A logged-in user can change their name, email, and email notification preference and save the updated profile settings.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for a registered user account
Update the name field with a new valid name
Update the email field with a new valid email
Verify the updated profile settings are visible
Verify the notification preference is reflected

title: Manage parking slots from the admin area
description: An admin can add or toggle a parking slot and see the updated slot list in the management view.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for an admin account
Add a new parking slot or toggle an existing slot
Verify the updated slot list is displayed
Verify the slot status change is visible

title: View all bookings in the admin booking list
description: This verifies that an admin can open the bookings page and review the full booking list.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the all bookings view is displayed

title: Change password from settings
description: A logged-in user can change their password from settings and see a successful password update confirmation.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for a registered user account
Verify a password update confirmation is visible

title: Review all bookings as admin
description: An admin can open the bookings management page and see the complete booking list.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for an admin account
Verify booking management information is visible

title: View a receipt directly after booking completion
description: A logged-in user can open a completed booking receipt page and see the booking summary and charges.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for a registered user account
Verify a receipt page is displayed
Verify booking summary and charges are visible

title: Open the admin analytics page
description: This verifies that an admin can navigate to the analytics view and see performance metrics.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Review admin analytics
description: An admin can open the analytics view and see parking activity summaries.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for an admin account
Verify parking activity summaries are visible

title: Update parking system settings
description: A logged-in user can modify parking system settings from the settings page and save the changes successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for a registered user account
Update a system setting with a valid value
Verify the updated system settings are visible
Verify a save confirmation is visible

title: Optionally scan a plate during booking
description: A logged-in driver can use the optional plate scan control during booking and still complete the reservation successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for a driver account
Fill in the vehicle number field with a valid vehicle number
Verify a booking confirmation is visible

title: Open the parking map from the landing page
description: A visitor can navigate from the landing page to the parking map and see slot availability information.

steps.description: Click the link to the parking map
Verify the parking map is displayed
Verify parking slot availability information is visible

title: Prevent access to the dashboard before login
description: This test verifies that an unauthenticated visitor cannot access protected dashboard content and is routed to authenticate instead.

steps.description: Verify the login or registration prompt is displayed
Verify protected dashboard content is not visible

title: Keep booking confirmation hidden until required details are provided
description: A logged-in driver cannot complete booking submission until the vehicle number has been entered, and the form remains on the booking page.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for a driver account
Verify a booking confirmation is not visible
Verify the booking form remains available

title: Show invalid login feedback
description: This test verifies that incorrect login credentials are rejected and an invalid credentials message is shown.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the password field with an incorrect password
Verify an invalid credentials message is visible

title: Show password validation when confirmation does not match
description: A logged-in user sees a validation error and the password is not changed when the new password confirmation does not match.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for a registered user account
Verify a password validation error is visible
Verify the password update is not confirmed

title: Show validation feedback for invalid registration
description: This test verifies that invalid registration input is rejected and validation feedback is shown to the user.

steps.description: Submit the registration form without entering required details
Verify registration validation feedback is visible
